text.title: Elicitation Techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Every session is a 1:1 interview regardless of info type.
antipattern.root-cause: Author defaults to the technique they are most comfortable with.
antipattern.fix: Force technique-to-info-type mapping; reject homogeneous plans.

antipattern.symptom: Sessions list participants who never confirmed availability.
antipattern.root-cause: Author writes the plan without scheduling.
antipattern.fix: Require calendar-hold proof per participant before plan acceptance.
Require info_type per session; tie to rationale_map.
